subcodes.first_line: O thou who believest in the Beauty that perisheth not and art assured of the Manifestation of the Ever-Abiding Lord! Upon thee be the Glory of God from the Kingdom of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بجمال بی زوال و موقن بظهور حضرت لایزال علیک بهاء الله من ملکوت الجمال
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @nearness and remoteness
